Settings.HttpGenerator.Description: Configure Visual Studio generation defaults for HTTP File Generator.
Settings.HttpGenerator.OutputFolderPolic: When enabled, generated files are written to a sibling HttpFiles folder beside the selected OpenAPI document. When disabled, files are written beside the selected OpenAPI document.
Settings.HttpGenerator.BaseUrl.Descripti: Optional base URL override passed to the generator.
Settings.HttpGenerator.ContentType.Descr: Content type override passed to the generator.
Settings.HttpGenerator.GenerateMultipleF: When enabled, the generator writes one .http file per request instead of a single combined file.
AzureToken.Title: Azure Entra ID Token
AzureToken.TenantId.Label: Tenant ID (optional)
AzureToken.Scope.Label: Scope
